_comment: REAL Apple SEC XBRL facts, each value+period_end verified live via edgartools (exact-integer re-probe 2026-07-14). iphone_revenue spans the 2018 tagging-regime break (OLD: SalesRevenueNet + us-gaap:ProductOrServiceAxis + aapl:AppleIphoneMember; NEW: RevenueFromContractWithCustomerExcludingAssessedTax + srt:ProductOrServiceAxis + aapl:IPhoneMember). gross_profit is a flat single-concept series (no dimension). Values in USD. NOTE: `fiscal_year` here is DERIVED FROM period_end (the year the fiscal period ends) — the edgartools raw `fiscal_year` column is unreliable for prior-year comparatives, so period MUST be derived from period_end, never that column. | AUGMENTED 2026-07-18 (T5, docs/loom/plans/2026-07-16-operational-kpi-quarterly.md): every fact now carries the producer's parallel period-label group (duration_months=12 — all facts here are annual 10-K facts — calendar_year/calendar_quarter, fiscal_year/fiscal_quarter, derivation_basis) derived by the REAL sec_edgar_client._derive_fiscal_label against each filer's nominal dei calendar (AAPL --09-27, NFLX --12-31, INTC --12-26), mirroring the current producer emission (docs/loom/memory/fixtures-mirror-producer-shape.md). The raw edgartools fiscal_year column value is REPLACED by the honest derived label.
